failure_summary: 3 TestStageModels tests failed with 'TypeError: _FakePopen object does not support the context manager protocol' — Python 3.14 changed subprocess.run to use Popen as a context manager (with Popen(...) as process:), but _FakePopen lacked __enter__/__exit__. Additionally, the underlying implementation in run_claude now routes through claude_dispatch.spawn (not Popen directly), so patching subprocess.Popen never captured the --model argument in interactive mode. Fixed by replacing _FakePopen + subprocess.Popen patch with a claude_dispatch.spawn mock that captures the model kwarg and reconstructs the expected argv shape.
